news.headline: STERIS reports 6% growth in total revenue to $1.4B for Q3 Fiscal 2025 compared to $1.3B in Q3 Fiscal 2024.
news.summary: In Dublin, Ireland, on February 5, 2025, STERIS plc (NYSE: STE) disclosed its financial outcomes for the fiscal 2025 third quarter finishing on December 31, 2024. The total revenue from ongoing operations for the third quarter of fiscal 2025 witnessed a 6% surge, reaching $1.4 billion in contrast to $1.3 billion in the same period of fiscal 2024. Similarly, the constant currency organic revenue from ongoing operations for the third quarter exhibited a corresponding 6% rise.

news.headline: News Corp's Q2 fiscal 2025: Revenue up 5% to $2.24B, net income from ops up 58% to $306M. CEO pleased with results.
news.summary: In New York, News Corporation ("News Corp") announced their financial results for the quarter ending on December 31, 2024. CEO Robert Thomson expressed satisfaction with the outcomes, emphasizing growth in both quality and quantity. Revenues from continuing operations, excluding Foxtel, saw a 5% increase, reaching $2.24 billion. Net income from continuing operations also showed a significant surge, rising by 58% to $306 million. News Corp is listed on Nasdaq under NWS and NWSA, as well as on ASX under NWS and NWSLV.

news.headline: AvalonBay reports Q4 2024 EPS of $1.98, 16.5% increase from Q4 2023. FFO per share unchanged at $2.63; Core FFO per share up to $2.80.
news.summary: Arlington-based AvalonBay Communities, Inc. (NYSE: AVB) released its financial report for the fourth quarter of 2024 compared to the same period in 2023. In Q4 2024, the Company reported an Earnings per Share (EPS) of $1.98, representing a 16.5% increase from the $1.70 reported in Q4 2023. Funds from Operations (FFO) per share remained unchanged at $2.63 between the two quarters. Core FFO per share, however, saw a slight increase from $2.74 in Q4 2023 to $2.80 in Q4 2024. These figures provide insights into the Company's financial performance for investors and stakeholders.

news.headline: Magma Power reveals 18th patent for detecting and drilling through magma reservoirs, with 19 worldwide patents.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on February 5, 2025, Magma Power LLC introduced an innovative drilling technique and system allowing for accurate identification and controlled drilling into underground magma reservoirs. This cutting-edge technology, safeguarded by nineteen global patents, sets a new standard in geothermal exploration and production.

news.headline: Beyond Oil delivers 10.8T order to Latitude as part of agreement. Receives payment with US$8.3M minimum for 2025.
news.summary: Following a recent announcement, Beyond Oil has successfully delivered its first order and received the payment for January as per the previously disclosed agreement. The agreement includes minimum commitments totaling US$8.3 million for the year 2025.

news.headline: Market update: Dow Jones up, Nasdaq recovers losses despite Google drop; Small caps outperforming. Navidia rises, MicroStrategy falls before earnings.
news.summary: In the stock market today, small caps showed a strong performance, outperforming other sectors. The Nasdaq managed to mitigate losses as Google stock, Mueller Water, and Fiserv presented new entry points for investors. The Dow Jones also saw gains, partly due to Nvidia's rise. However, Google faced a decline, while MicroStrategy fell ahead of its earnings report. This dynamic movement in the market was covered live without explicitly mentioning the source.

news.headline: Rayonier Q4 2024 net income $327.1M, $2.15 per share, on revenues $726.3M, up from $126.9M, $0.85 per share, $467.4M in prior year.
news.summary: In Wildlight, Florida, Rayonier Inc. (NYSE:RYN) announced a fourth quarter net income attributable to Rayonier at $327.1 million, equating to $2.15 per share, with revenues totaling $726.3 million. This marks a significant increase from the previous year's fourth quarter figures of net income at $126.9 million, or $0.85 per share, and revenues of $467.4 million. Notably, the fourth quarter results were boosted by $291.1 million in income from Large Dispositions, along with a $1.6 million gain from the termination of a cash flow hedge.

news.headline: PVH Corp. declares $0.0375/share quarterly cash dividend, payable on March 26, 2025 to stockholders of record on March 5. PVH is a global fashion company with iconic brands like Calvin Klein and TOMMY HILFIGER.
news.summary: PVH Corp. declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.0375 per share payable on March 26, 2025, to stockholders of record on March 5, 2025, as revealed by the Executive Committee of the Board of Directors. PVH Corp. is a leading global fashion company with a presence in over 40 markets. It boasts iconic brands like Calvin Klein and TOMMY HILFIGER, holding a history spanning over 140 years that is underpinned by brand strength.

news.headline: $40K worth of eggs stolen in Pennsylvania amidst shortage, leaving 100,000 missing. Shoppers nationwide dealing with high prices and empty shelves.
news.summary: Authorities reported that eggs valued at $40,000 were stolen, coinciding with a national trend of empty shelves and increased egg prices in grocery stores.

news.headline: UGI Corp (NYSE: UGI) declares $0.375 quarterly dividend per share of common stock, payable April 1, 2025, to shareholders of record as of March 17, 2025.
news.summary: In Valley Forge, PA, the Board of Directors of UGI Corporation (NYSE: UGI) has announced a quarterly dividend of $0.375 per share for its common stock. This dividend will be paid on April 1, 2025, to shareholders on record as of March 17, 2025. UGI Corporation (NYSE: UGI) is a leading distributor and marketer of energy products and services across the United States and Europe, providing secure and sustainable energy solutions to customers through its subsidiaries.
